title: FERROS Card
description: Canonical schema for the atomic FERROS object (ADR-010). A Card is the smallest unit of content, interaction, or identity in the system. Cards carry their own rendering logic reference, state, and identity hash.

version.description: Monotonically increasing version number. Each edit creates a new version.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 or djb2 hash of the card's content for integrity verification. Null if not yet computed.

renderFile.description: Relative path to the HTML file that renders this card

metadata.description: Card-type-specific metadata. Not constrained — varies by card role.

attribution.description: Links this card to a profile identity

createdBy.description: Genesis hash of the creating profile, or null for system cards

linkedTo.description: Genesis hash of the owning profile. Null for unlinked/system cards.

cardState.description: Current interactive state of the card. Separate from content to allow view/instance state without mutating the card itself.

pose.description: Arbitrary pose data for the current state

transform.description: 3D spatial transform. CSS px for translation, degrees for rotation.
